Opcode.name: PCM_OP_SUBSCRIPTION_ORDERED_BALGRP_BULK_MODIFY
Opcode.Doc: This op-code allows CSR's to create/modify an ordered-balance-group object. If an account/service wants to use resources from a shared pool that some other account/service owns, then this account/service will be added as a member in the resource-sharing object (owned by the owner). In addition the member account/services will require configuring the order in which the balance group will be used. For example, if the user is a service and it owns a balance group and that the service instance can share resources from the account, in that case there are two balance groups that the 'user' events can consume from: one its own and one from the account. The ordered balance group list will determine the order in which the balance groups will be used

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Group instance poid either /group/sharing/discounts, /group/sharing/charges or /group/sharing/profiles object.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_POSITION
Int.Doc: Priority of the group in the ordered balance group. This will be either highest (ORDERED_BALGRP_POSITION_TOP) or least (ORDERED_BALGRP_POSITION_BOTTOM). If ORDERED_BALGRP_POSITION_TOP is chosen for the Charge Sharing/discount sharing group, it will be added to the top of the existing charge sharing/discount sharing group. If ORDERED_BALGRP_POSITION_BOTTOM is chosen for the Charge Sharing/discount sharing group, it will be added to the bottom of the existing charge sharing/discount sharing group. Note: All the discount sharing groups are ordered and placed before the charge sharing group in the ordered_balgroup.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_MEMBERS
Array.Doc: member details array (list of member account/service instance). If no members are passed, no action is performed on the members. If an empty members array element is passed, then no action will be taken.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_SERVICE_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Member service object. If the service object is NULL, it means that the member is an account.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Poid of the group-sharing object modified.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Poid of the event object created

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.
